features: 【High Quality Materials】: Strong flexible nail filethe nail filers are made of stainless steel with durable sapphire grit, quick work and easy to clean
【Anti-Slip Designed】: The anti-slip handle is designed for easy control, the sharp sword t ip are fine enough to buff nails and clean dirt underneath nails
【Double-Ended Design】: Thanks to its clever handle, this nail file fits perfectly into the hand and allows for precise work. The handle is also suitable for pushing back cuticles
【Portable Size】: Nail files are lightweight and compact(15.2cm/6''), small and does not take up space, so you can take it with you when you go out
【Wide Usages】: Meet professional nail salon and home nail care needs. Whether at home or out, you can easily use this nail file to take care of your nails
description: Product Description Sularpek 6 pcs nail file can be used on both fingernails and toenails for at home or on the go manicures and pedicures. Product Description: 1. Nail files can be used for shaping, sanding, smoothing, polishing. 2. Durable,perfect for the immediate repair of broken fingernails on the way. 3. Nail files can also be used to repair broken off or torn nails and the tip can be used for cleaning your nails. 4. The files are produced with a well-shaped, light and ergonomic handle which are designed to provide very good leverage. Note: Not suitable for weak or brittle nails and take extra care on natural nails. Specifications: Material: Stainless steel Size: 15.2cm/6 inches Color: Black + White Quantity: 6 pack Package includes: 6 x metal nail files
